# Security Policy

## Maintainer Account Security

Maintainers with write access are expected to enable two-factor authentication on GitHub. Hardware security keys or passkeys are preferred for organization owners and release maintainers.

## Reporting Vulnerabilities

Please report suspected vulnerabilities privately through GitHub security advisories when available. If advisories are unavailable, contact the maintainers before publishing details.

## Dependency Hygiene

Security-sensitive dependency or supply-chain changes should include a short note describing the affected package, version, and runtime boundary.
